title: KDNA Outcome Record
description: Schema for recording the actual outcome of a KDNA-generated judgment, enabling long-term judgment-outcome tracking and domain asset improvement.

record_version.description: Version of the outcome record schema.

outcome_id.description: Unique identifier for this outcome record. UUID or ULID recommended.

judgment_reference.description: Reference to the judgment that produced this outcome.

trace_id.description: The trace_id of the judgment trace that predicted this outcome.

input_hash.description: Hash of the original input. Must match the input_hash in the judgment trace.

domain_version.description: Version of the domain asset at judgment time.

predicted.description: What the judgment predicted (copied from judgment trace for convenience).

actual_classification.description: The correct classification, if different from prediction. Only required if status is incorrect or partially_correct.

description.description: Narrative description of what actually happened.

evidence.description: Supporting evidence for the actual outcome.

reference.description: Link, ID, or reference to the evidence.

summary.description: Brief summary of what the evidence shows.

outcome_delay.description: How long until the outcome was known.

delay_days.description: Number of days between prediction and outcome confirmation.

revision_needed.description: Whether the original judgment needs revision. True if actual outcome contradicts prediction.

revision_type.description: Type of revision needed, if any.

impact.description: Business impact of the judgment (correct or incorrect).

cost_avoided.description: Estimated cost avoided by correct judgment (in USD or local currency).

cost_incurred.description: Estimated cost incurred by incorrect judgment.

time_saved_days.description: Time saved or lost in days.

qualitative_impact.description: Description of non-quantifiable impact (morale, trust, reputation).

feedback.description: Human feedback on the judgment and outcome.

reviewer.description: Identifier of the person who reviewed the outcome.

domain_package_should_change.description: Whether this outcome suggests the KDNA domain asset needs updating.

suggested_changes.description: Specific changes suggested for the domain asset.

element_id.description: ID of the element to change.

recorded_at.description: When this outcome record was created.

improvement_proposal_refs.description: References to formal improvement proposals created from this outcome record.

privacy_level.description: Privacy classification of this outcome record.
